highlights.title: Claude Code v2.1.131 Released
highlights.summary: This patch fixes two important bugs: the VS Code extension was failing to activate on Windows due to a hardcoded build path, and Mantle endpoint authentication was broken due to a missing API key header. Windows users who have been unable to get the extension running should update immediately.

highlights.title: Claude Code v2.1.129 Released
highlights.summary: This release adds a `--plugin-url` flag so you can load plugins directly from a URL without downloading them manually, plus a new `CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT=1` environment variable for terminals like Emacs `eat` that miss auto-detection. There is also a new environment variable for overriding the package manager Claude Code uses, giving power users more control over their setup.

highlights.title: Claude Code v2.1.126 Released
highlights.summary: The `/model` picker now dynamically fetches available models from your gateway's `/v1/models` endpoint when using a custom `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`, making it easier to switch models on self-hosted or third-party gateways. A new `claude project purge` command lets you cleanly delete all Claude Code state for a project, including transcripts, tasks, and config entries.

highlights.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
highlights.summary: Anthropic has announced Claude Opus 4.7, the latest addition to the Opus model family. Developers using Claude Code should check the announcement for updated capability details and consider switching to the new model via the `/model` picker for more demanding coding tasks.

highlights.title: Uber Torches 2026 AI Budget on Claude Code in Four Months
highlights.summary: Reports indicate Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI tooling budget on Claude Code in just four months, highlighting how rapidly token costs can escalate at enterprise scale. This is a cautionary tale for teams adopting Claude Code widely — setting per-user or per-project spending limits and monitoring usage dashboards is essential before rolling out broadly.

highlights.title: Mastering Claude Code in 30 Minutes
highlights.summary: This YouTube tutorial promises a focused, 30-minute walkthrough designed to get developers productive with Claude Code quickly. It is a good pick if you want a time-boxed introduction that covers the most important workflows without spending hours on beginner content.

highlights.title: 9-Minute Guide: Claude Code Installation, How It Works, and Real Usage (Accessible in China)
highlights.summary: This Bilibili video offers a concise 9-minute beginner guide covering Claude Code installation, core concepts, and practical usage examples, with a specific focus on connecting from mainland China without a VPN. It is an ideal starting point for Chinese-speaking developers who have struggled with network access issues when setting up Claude Code.

highlights.title: DeepClaude – Claude Code Agent Loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
highlights.summary: DeepClaude is an open-source project that replaces the reasoning backbone of the Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, potentially reducing API costs while maintaining strong coding performance. Developers who want to experiment with alternative model backends or reduce spend should check out the GitHub repo and compare results against the default Opus setup.

tips_of_the_day: If you are on Windows and the Claude Code VS Code extension refuses to activate after an update, run `npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest` to grab the latest patch (v2.1.131+) which fixes a hardcoded build path bug specific to Windows.

Before rolling out Claude Code to your whole team, set a monthly token budget in your Anthropic console and configure per-user API keys so you can track spend by developer — enterprise-scale usage can exhaust budgets far faster than expected, as recent news about large tech companies demonstrates.

Use `claude project purge` (added in v2.1.126) to clean up stale transcripts and cached state for old or abandoned projects, keeping your workspace tidy and preventing outdated context from leaking into new sessions.
